name: "All Fangs and Snarls"
description: A farewell gift made by a brilliant mechanical inventor of Nod-Krai for soldiers returning from an expedition. Its shape resembles a certain famous animal, mouth wide and fangs bared, as though it were endlessly howling. For reasons unknown, it also bears the faint, unmistakable aroma of wine.\nWhen friends gather together with little else to occupy them, this curious contraption can serve as a lively game. Who among them shall evade the snapping fangs, and who are the souls destined to fall into the wolf's waiting jaws?
